item.title: About
item.description:
I am a backend-focused developer who enjoys building practical software systems that solve real operational problems.

Most of my experience comes from developing management platforms, internal tools, and data-driven applications where reliability, structure, and maintainability matter.

I enjoy designing application logic, organizing data flows, and creating systems that remain understandable as requirements grow.

While I can work across the full stack when needed, my current focus is improving my backend engineering skills and exploring Go through hands-on projects.

item.title: Expense Tracker API
item.description:
A full-stack expense tracking web application built with Go. Users can register, log in, and manage expenses through a web interface styled with Pico CSS and enhanced with HTMX for dynamic interactions.

Tech

  • Language: Go 1.26
  • Web server: net/http (stdlib) — no framework
  • Database: PostgreSQL
  • SQL layer: sqlc (type-safe code generation from SQL)
  • Templates: a-h/templ (type-safe HTML templates)
  • Auth: golang-jwt/jwt/v5 (JWT via HTTP-only cookies)
  • Passwords: bcrypt
  • Frontend: HTMX + Pico CSS
  • Dev tools: air (hot reload), templ watch mode
